Who It's Built For

One platform, built to fit however you already work with your audience.

Individuals

Turn your own market knowledge into a branded platform your audience can join, without building any of the backend yourself.

BDMs

Give your leads and clients something exclusive to engage with: a branded tool that keeps your name and relationship front and center.

Partnership Managers

Offer affiliates and partners a ready-made platform they can promote under your brand, with zero technical setup on their side.

Community Owners

Replace scattered manual tools with one branded bot ecosystem that tracks, educates, and engages your members automatically.

What Your Platform Includes

Everything below runs under your own branding.

This is an indicative overview. Every tool can be adjusted, removed, or added following a conversation about what fits your audience best.

Onboarding & Education

A guided welcome experience for new members, with structured lessons covering forex, crypto, CFDs, risk management, and market psychology.

Live Market Data

Real-time prices and daily movement across major currency pairs, metals, energy, and crypto assets, always at your audience's fingertips.

Market Analysis Tools

On-demand analysis, market sentiment, and multi-timeframe views your audience can request for any asset they're watching.

News & Market Updates

Scheduled and on-demand news digests covering finance, geopolitics, and markets, available in multiple languages.

Calendar & Session Alerts

A daily economic calendar plus market session open and close alerts, so your audience never misses a key moment.

Trade Journal & Tools

Built-in tools for your audience to log trades, track their own performance, and calculate position size and risk.

Broker Integration

Your preferred partner broker presented with logo, features, leverage, and spreads, right inside the platform.

Optional add-on

Automated Market Signals

Your platform can also deliver automated trade ideas to your audience, layered on top of the tools above.

Fully customizable

Your Own Branding

Your name, your voice, your community. The platform is presented under your identity from the first message onward.

Platform Deep-Dive

Bots & Channels

A closer look at what your community interacts with day to day. This is an indicative setup. Bots, channels, and tools can all be changed, added, or removed based on what you and your audience need.

Main Bot

The first point of contact for new traders. The system recognizes each member automatically and welcomes them in.

Education

12 market topics, including Forex, Crypto, Smart Money Concepts, and Risk Management, with fresh AI-generated content every time a topic is opened.

Brokers

The partner broker presented with logo, features, leverage, and spreads.

Market Overview

Live prices for 14 assets, including forex, commodities, crypto, and the Dollar Index, with 24-hour change.

Our Community

Every channel, bot, and social link in one place.

Signals Bot

The main toolkit for active traders.

Analysis

Choose a pair and receive an AI-generated read with trend, entry, stop loss, and take profit.

Sentiment

Fear & Greed Index, Dollar Index trend, Gold trend, and VIX in one view.

Calendar

High-impact economic events for the day.

Status & Portfolio

Live open trades and running profit and loss.

Risk Calculator

Position sizing from balance, risk percentage, and stop-loss distance.

Volatility Alert

Flags pairs moving more than their average range.

Trade Journal

Automatic and manual trade logging.

Signal History & S&R Levels

Past signal performance and support/resistance zones.

Multi-Timeframe Analysis

A combined short- and higher-timeframe view for any pair.

News

On-demand breaking news, filtered and summarized.

News Bot

On-demand news in multiple languages, plus calendar and sentiment tools available on request.

Regional & Global News

Coverage of regional news, global finance, geopolitics, and markets.

Calendar & Sentiment

Available on request alongside the news feed.

Signals Channel

Automated market signals delivered around the clock during active market sessions, built on whichever strategy you already follow or want us to run for you (Smart Money Concepts or otherwise), with multi-timeframe confirmation and disciplined risk management.

News Channel

A structured daily schedule of market news and session alerts, keeping your audience informed from the Tokyo open through the New York close.

Updates Channel

Weekly previews, daily market tips, weekly wrap-ups, and market psychology content to keep your community engaged.

How Your Audience Is Tracked

Every person who joins your platform is recognized individually and automatically, from the moment they arrive. This means you always have an accurate, real-time count of your active audience, with no duplicates and no manual counting, whatever combination of tools your platform includes.

Trust & Transparency

Built to be shown to your audience with confidence.

A disclaimer accompanies every signal, analysis, and welcome message: "Not financial advice. Markets involve significant risk of loss."

This overview is a demo, built to show you what's possible. Every tool can be adjusted, removed, or replaced, and new tools can be added, based on a conversation about what fits your brand and your audience best.

Pricing & Service Terms

Clear rules, no surprises. Figures confirmed on a call.

The exact numbers for your setup are discussed in a short pricing conversation. Everything below is how setup, billing, and support actually work.

Hosting & Ownership

The Toolkit is hosted and maintained entirely by NOVA VA on our own infrastructure. You receive full access to use your branded bot(s); source code, backend, and server access remain our property and are not transferred. You're only responsible for your own back-office / user management as agreed at setup.

Setup & Delivery

Work begins once the initial deposit is received, with the remaining balance due on delivery. Typical delivery time is 3–5 business days. No monthly fee applies during this setup period.

Monthly Plan

A flat monthly fee covers up to 200 users, with a small per-user rate beyond that. Billing is based on each person's unique Telegram ID, so no one is ever counted twice, and the live figure is available to you on request. Fees are due in advance on the 1st of each month and are not prorated for partial months.

Free Support & Changes

Bug fixes (anything that doesn't work as originally delivered) are always free and unlimited. Your first 5 customization requests after delivery are free too. Beyond that, each additional change is billed individually, and we always confirm in writing whether a request is a bug fix or a customization before starting work.

USDT / Solana

Payment & Billing Cycle

All fees are calculated in Euros and settled via USDT (TRC20) or Solana at the equivalent rate at time of payment. A 2-day grace period applies each month: payments through the 3rd are accepted without issue. If payment still hasn't arrived by the end of the 4th, the system is automatically deactivated, with no further warning given. Reactivation requires settling the outstanding balance and may involve a brief new setup step.

Termination

Either party may terminate with 14 days' written notice. Upon termination, the bot(s) are deactivated and no source code or backend access is transferred at any point. No refunds are issued for the setup fee or the current paid month.

This overview outlines how the service works and is not an invoice, receipt, or fiscal document. A written confirmation is provided each time a payment is received.

Frequently Asked

Answers before you reach out.

What if I already have my own bot or provider?

We can build alongside what you already run, or replace it outright. Either way, your community migrates in without your members ever noticing a seam.

How fast can this go live?

Once your deposit is in, delivery takes 3–5 business days. You'll see your branded platform working before the final balance is even due.

Who owns the bot and the data?

The bot itself runs on our infrastructure and stays our property, but every signup, every interaction, every member is visible to you in real time. Your audience is always yours.

Can I customize or add features later?

Always. Bug fixes are free and unlimited, and your first 5 customization requests after delivery cost nothing either. Anything past that gets scoped and confirmed with you upfront. No surprise work, ever.

What if I want to stop?

Just 14 days' written notice, either side. No contracts to escape, no fine print to untangle.

Is this safe to show my audience?

Every signal, analysis, and message carries a clear disclaimer: "Not financial advice. Markets involve significant risk of loss." Transparency isn't an afterthought here; it's built in.

What will I have that everyone else who buys this doesn't?

Almost everything is configurable per client: which tools are active (education, signals, risk calculator, trade journal, and more), the markets and assets you focus on (forex, crypto, commodities, indices), the analysis approach and strategy behind it, the languages your content is delivered in, your broker partner, and the full voice and branding your audience sees. Two clients can run the same underlying toolkit and still end up with platforms that look, market, and trade completely differently.

Let's shape it around your audience

Let's talk about your platform.
